prompt: Using the provided reference image, restore and enhance it into a sharp, high-resolution photorealistic photo. Keep the same composition, framing, subject pose, blue background, and beige foreground ledge unchanged, but remove heavy noise and blur, recover natural detail in the kitten’s fur, eyes, ears, whiskers, and facial features, improve lighting and color accuracy, and make the image look like it was captured with a professional camera. Preserve the original identity and proportions of the kitten; do not add new objects, text, or change the scene.
